final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing employee ID badge for ByteDance (字节跳动), showing both front and back sides, intended for internal corporate use.

Style/medium: photorealistic corporate ID badge photography with the clean precision of modern tech company branding
Composition: dual-view layout showing front and back of the badge side by side, front side with photo and name, back side with barcode/QR and access info
Subject: ByteDance employee ID badge, front side featuring employee photo placeholder, name field, employee number, company logo; back side with barcode, QR code, emergency contact info, issue date
Scene/backdrop: neutral studio surface with soft shadow beneath the badge
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting creating gentle shadows, the quiet professionalism of corporate identity
Color palette: ByteDance brand blues with clean white card base, neutral grays for text
Materials/textures: matte PVC card stock with subtle sheen, smooth laminated surface, crisp printed text
Text (verbatim): 字节跳动 (ByteDance logo text), employee name placeholder, ID number, issue date, barcode numbers
Constraints: both front and back visible, realistic badge proportions, all text legible, company branding accurate
Avoid: cartoonish rendering, overly glossy plastic look, illegible micro-text, Western tech company aesthetics mismatched with Chinese corporate identity
